narrative:
Cols 36-C (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,582 registered voters, with 73.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 9.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.2%, a clear Democratic lean of 6.3 percentage points.
